content.code:
# Evidence: asteroids-production-defense-14yyds
# Competency: asteroids-production-defense.
# Case 4783: a headless continuous-integration replay.
# Operating constraint: keep every critical cue available through more than color or sound and every action remappable without timing precision.
# Changed case: lose window focus while thrust and fire are held, then prove both actions release safely.
def evidence_asteroids_production_defense_14yyds(correctness: bool = True, accessibility: bool = True, performance: bool = True, portability: bool = True, security: bool = True, rollback: bool = True, recovery: bool = True, residual_risk_owned: bool = True) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_14yyds = "14yyds-sdyy41-4783"
    assert evidence_variant_14yyds
    evidence_axes_14yyds = (
        "player14yyds",
        "seed4783",
        "inputsdyy41",
        "frame14yyds4783",
        "state478314yyds",
        "playtestsdyy414783",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_14yyds)) == 6
    gates = (correctness, accessibility, performance, portability, security, rollback, recovery)
    passed = sum(1 for gate in gates if gate)
    if not correctness or not accessibility:
        return False, passed, "player-quality"
    if not performance or not portability or not security:
        return False, passed, "release-quality"
    if not rollback or not recovery:
        return False, passed, "recovery-gap"
    if not residual_risk_owned:
        return False, passed, "unowned-risk"
    assert passed == len(gates)
    return True, passed, "production-game-defense"
